raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tā fakka tas KUNGS: Ras schai Puistahta valcēk/ tas
nomirs zaur Sobbinu/ zaur Baddu/ un zaur Mehri/ bet kas
abran eet pee teem Kaldeēreem/
tas dsihwohs/ un (ismeffihs)
fawu Dwchfeli ka Laupijumu/
un dsihwohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tā fakka tas KUNGS:
Schis Pilsfahts taps wiffai
nodochts tam Karra-Spehkain
no Babeles Rohkā/ ka tas to
usņemim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tee Leeli-Kun-
gi us to Kehnizu : Leez jelle scho
Wibru nokant : Jo ta darra
wiꞥsch to Karra Wihru Rohkas
gurdenas/ kas wehl schai Pils-
fahta atteek/ un tahs Rohkas
wiffin Lauschu/ kad wiꞥsch tah-
dus Wahrdus us teem runna/
ka fchee irr: Jo schis Wihrs ne
mekle tcho Lauschu Labklahtcha-
nu/ bet to Laununu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch Zedeķi-
jus fazzija: Rangi/ tas irr juh-
fās Rohkās/ jo tas Kehnisch ne
spehj prett jums neneeka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad jehme tee Jeremiju/
un mette to eeksch tahs Bedres
Malkjus ta Dehla Anuneleka/
kas Zeetuma Pagalmā bija/ un
nolaide Jeremiju ar Wirwehm/
et tai Bedrē ne bija Uhdens/
et Duhnas/ un Jeremijus ee-
rinne Duhnās.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu EbedMeleks tas
Mohru Wihrs/ weens Kambar-
unkurs/ kas Kehnina Nam-
nā bija/dsirdeja/ ka tee Jeremi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad isgahje EbedMeleks
no ta kehnina Namma/ un run-
naja us to Kehnizu/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Mans Kungs Kehnisch/
schee Wihri irr taunadarijschi
eeksch wiffa/ ko tee irr darrijschi
teeme Pratveeta Jeremijus/ ko
tur wiꞥsch toinehr fawā Weetā buh-
tu Baddā nomirris/ tapehz ka
Maises wairs Pilsfahta ne ir-
raid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad pawehleja tas Keh-
nisch EbedMelekam tam Moh-
eu Wihran/ un fazzija : Neinn
no schennenes trihsdefinitis Wih-
rus ar tewim/ un iswelz to Pra-
weetu Jeremiju no tas Bedres/
pirms tas nomirst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nehme EbedMeleks
tohs Wihrus ar fewim/un nahze
ta Kehnina Namma appaksch to
Manta Kambara/ un nehme no
turrenes kahdus wezzus faplih-
fuschus/ un wezzus nodilluschus
Lakkatus/ un nolaide tohs pee
Jeremijus ar Wirwehm eeksch
tahs Bedres.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un EbedMeleks tas Moh-
eu Wihrs fazzija us Jeremiju:
Leez jelle tohs wezzus faplihsu-
schus un nodilluschus Lakkatus
appaksch tawu. Rohku Paduf-
seem apkahrt tahnt Wirwehm /
un Jeremijus darrija ta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee iswilke Jeremiju
ar Wirwehm/ un zehle winnu
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
